<!-- Our AI triage system will automatically categorize your issue, assess severity
     and likelihood, apply labels, and route it. Just describe your issue clearly
     using the sections below as guidance. Remove or skip any that don't apply. -->

## Description

<!-- What is this about? What is the problem you want to solve? Describe the bug, feature request, task, or question. -->

## Expected vs Actual Behavior

<!-- If reporting a bug: What did you expect to happen, and what happened instead? -->

## Steps to Reproduce

<!-- If reporting a bug: Clear steps to reproduce the issue. -->

## Motivation / Use Case

<!-- If requesting a feature or task: Why is this needed? What problem does it solve? -->

## Acceptance Criteria

<!-- Define what "done" looks like. Use a checklist if possible. -->

- [ ] ...

## Additional Context

<!-- Any extra context, screenshots, values.yaml snippets, workarounds, logs, errors etc. -->

## References

<!-- Related issues, PRs, docs, or existing patterns. -->

## Environment

<!-- If relevant, include details to help us reproduce or understand the context. -->

- **Platform:** <!-- e.g. GKE, EKS, OpenShift, Kind -->
- **Helm CLI version:**
- **Chart version:**
- **Kubernetes version:**
